content.scenarioHint: 你可以问你的朋友是否使用社交媒体APP的某个功能或产品
expectedAnswers: Do you use Reels? I'm obsessed with the new filters.
Have you tried the new feature on TikTok?
What do you think about the latest update on Instagram?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否正确表达了询问意图
语言准确性：语法和用词是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合英语口语习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了场景关键词

content.scenarioHint: 你正在和朋友讨论社交媒体应用，想了解对方为什么选择使用Threads而不是其他平台，比如Twitter或Instagram。
expectedAnswers: Why do you prefer Threads over other apps?
What makes you stick with Threads when there are so many alternatives?
Isn't Threads just like Twitter? Why not use the original one instead?
How is Threads different for you compared to other social media platforms?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确表达了对对方使用Threads原因的询问
语言准确性：语法结构正确，用词恰当，无明显错误
表达自然度：符合母语者日常对话习惯，语气自然不生硬
关键词覆盖：使用了场景关键词如Threads、app、platform、use等

content.speakerText: Which social media feature do you think is the most useful, and why?
content.speakerTextCn: 你认为哪个社交媒体功能最有用？为什么？
expectedAnswers: I think Stories are the most useful because they feel personal and disappear after 24 hours.
DMs—they let me chat privately with friends without posting publicly.
Reels for discovery; I’ve found so many small businesses through trending videos.
evaluationCriteria: 是否明确指出一个具体功能（如Stories, DMs, Reels）
是否给出合理且具体的理由（使用场景、情感、实用性）
是否使用了场景相关词汇（discovery, private, trending, authentic）
